FY26-27.statusDetail: The Board of Commissioners adopted this budget by ordinance on June 8, 2026, following the Manager's presentation and public hearing on May 11, 2026. These are the final adopted figures.

timeline.event: Budget request forms to Department Heads
Department requests returned to Town Manager
Budget available online and at Administrative Offices

highlights: Balanced without using fund balance for operating costs
Property tax rate unchanged at $0.44 per $100 of valuation
New positions: Assistant Project Manager, Downtown Marketing & Operations Coordinator, Development Services Division Manager – Planning, Senior Planner, plus additional legal services
Solid waste rates increase 2.4% due to CPI (GFL contract)
Health insurance moving to Aetna with a budgeted 3% cost increase
